title: Ipomoea cheliensis
intro: Ipomoea cheliensis, also known as Chinese moonflower, is a species of flowering plant in the morning glory family, characterized by its large, white, and fragrant flowers that bloom at night. The health benefits of Ipomoea cheliensis include its potential to lower blood sugar levels, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antioxidant properties, making it a valuable traditional medicine in Chinese and Ayurvedic practices. The bioactive constituents of this plant include alkaloids, flavonoids, and phenolic acids, which are responsible for its medicinal properties. The most common herbal preparations made with Ipomoea cheliensis include teas, tinctures, and capsules, which are often used to treat conditions such as diabetes, hypertension, and digestive disorders.
